text:
is a Cadet Corps cadet.

Appearance

Annie has her short blonde hair tied in a bun at the back of her head and a side fringe that normally covers her right eye. She has blue swirly eyes and often does not change her expression. Like her fellow cadets, she wears the regular cadet uniform.

Personality

Annie is rather expressionless and can get bored easily. She is hardworking and secretive, but also very aware of her surroundings.
